kind_name: Batch 5 Authority and Systems Capsule Standard
title: Batch 5 Authority and Systems Capsule Standard
source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)
purpose: Govern the public-safe Batch-5 capsule that imports exact macro bodies for post-execution authority validation, replay scope, proof repair harnessing, OS/state actuators, trace compaction, and static analysis.
negative_case_contract: live process descendant is never signalled
deleted doctrine code refs become drift findings
validation_rules: validate required public source refs and target refs remain public-safe
bind validator_refs and receipt_refs before active v2 source-standard projection
keep registry acceptance, release, provider dispatch, source mutation, private-root equivalence, runtime correctness, and whole-system correctness outside this contract
treat generated coverage, health, Mermaid, and Atlas surfaces as projections, not source evidence
receipt_expectations: receipt must cite validator command or focused test evidence, authority_ceiling, omissions, and anti_claims
receipt must not contain source bodies, private paths, credentials, provider payloads, or operator thread content
anti_claim: The Batch5 authority systems capsule standard is active as a source JSON contract only; this does not authorize release, provider dispatch, source mutation, private-root equivalence, accepted-organ registry metadata changes, runtime correctness, or whole-system correctness.
anti_claims: Active v2 source-standard status is not release or publication authority.
The receipt ref is support routing for this standard contract, not proof of whole-system correctness.
This source-standard activation does not mutate core/standards_registry.json or accept any organ.

standard_payload.ontology: A standard contract for the Batch5 authority systems capsule public-safe fixture and validation surfaces.
standard_payload.teleology: Make the Batch5 authority capsule walkable as an active governed standard while keeping authority ceilings explicit.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: A release approval, provider dispatch permission, live process control grant, or private-root equivalence claim.
failure_modes: bad proof advanced past the gate
deleted doctrine code refs treated as current

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; source refs and receipt refs do not grant release, provider dispatch, registry acceptance, private-root equivalence, runtime correctness, or whole-system correctness authority.

author.purpose: create a valid Batch5 authority systems capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch5 authority systems capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch5_authority_systems_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

selective.rule: relationships.used_by_organs declares route pressure only; it does not accept organs or prove runtime use

lattice_edges.authority_boundary: declared contract topology only; generated relation coverage remains computed by build_doctrine_projection.py

instance_schema.note: Required keys are projected from this standard source required_fields list; schema validation remains validator-owned.

schema_check.rule: instance validates against required_fields and this standard contract

source_boundary.rule: public instances cite source_refs and preserve public_private_boundary; private/raw/provider bodies are not exported

link_resolution.rule: required lattice edge targets resolve to governed instance ids; selective unresolved targets remain typed residual pressure

projection_freshness.rule: generated coverage, health, projection, and entry-card views are regenerable from JSON source

coverage_health.note: computed health; never evidence for source claims

compression.rule: preserve authority boundary and anti-claim before any status/count summary
